subcodes.first_line: The Great Day is manifest, and the mighty Cause is resplendent. This is that Day whereof the divine Books have testified to its majesty and grandeur [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: روز عظیم ظاهر و امر عظیم باهر این همان روزیست که کتب الهی بر عظمت و بزرگیش
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @knowledge; recognition of God, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
